steps.title: Identify the juxtaposition being claimed
steps.content: The underlined text asserts that The Grass Dancer resembles magical realist novels through juxtaposition—realistic fiction paired with Dakota traditions that serve as antirealistic elements.

steps.title: Find the choice that demonstrates this juxtaposition
steps.content:
Choice B shows precisely this: the novel maintains realistic conventions while incorporating Dakota traditions that transcend realism.

Choices A, C, and D either misplace the traditions' source, emphasize alternation over juxtaposition, or treat them as competing influences.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
